caption: Have you ever opened your fridge to find just eggs and bread, wondering what on earth to make? You're not alone! That's exactly why we created Peppera - to help turn those basic ingredients into delicious meals your family will love. Here are 5 tasty meals you can make right now with just eggs and bread. Download Peppera to discover even more simple, satisfying recipes based on what you already have in your kitchen!
hooks: Staring at eggs and bread again? Let's transform them into 5 delicious meals!
With just eggs and bread, you can create these 5 satisfying dinners.
Your pantry staples are about to become showstoppers!
platform_notes: Instagram carousel post. Each recipe slide should feature a beautifully styled food photo of the finished dish. Ensure all text is large enough to be readable on mobile devices.

brand_profile.name: Peppera
brand_profile.description: A meal-planning assistant that turns rough ingredients into practical dinner ideas.

mascot.name: Peppera
mascot.description: A cute anthropomorphic green bell pepper character with a round bulbous body narrowing at the top, bright lime-green skin with subtle darker green vertical ridges, large expressive oval eyes with white sclera and small black pupils, thin curved black eyebrows, a small open-mouth smile showing warmth. Wears a red bandana tied around the top of the head with the knot visible on the right side. Has simple thin black-stroke arms and legs with small rounded hands and feet. The overall style is flat 2D cartoon illustration with bold outlines, vibrant saturated colors, and no shading or gradients.
mascot.role: The recurring face of Peppera's TikTok and Instagram content — the main character in every visual story.
mascot.visualPrompt: A cute anthropomorphic green bell pepper character named Peppera. Round bulbous body narrowing at the top, bright lime-green skin with subtle darker green vertical ridges. Large expressive oval eyes with white sclera and small black pupils, thin curved black eyebrows, small open-mouth smile. Wears a red bandana tied around the top of the head with the knot visible on the right side. Simple thin black-stroke arms and legs with small rounded hands and feet. Flat 2D cartoon illustration style with bold outlines, vibrant saturated colors, no shading or gradients. Solid color background.
usageRules: Always include the mascot in mascot-led slides: hook, problem, escalation, reaction, discovery, cta.
Never include the mascot in meal_reveal or benefit slides — those are food-only.
The mascot must always have the red bandana, green pepper body, and same face shape.
Vary only the pose and expression to match the slide role — never vary the core design.
Never add accessories not in the spec (no chef hat, no utensils unless the slide prompt explicitly calls for them).

generation_request.notes: Pillar: pantry chaos. Ingredients: eggs, bread.

slides.text:
5 Meals From Just Eggs and Bread
When your fridge is giving... minimal
slides.visual_goal: Bold title card with brand colours

slides.image_prompt: Professional food photography, thick slices of golden brown French toast dusted with powdered sugar, topped with a pat of melting butter and drizzle of maple syrup, fresh berries on the side, on a ceramic plate, natural soft window lighting with warm tones, slight depth of field, appetising textures and high detail, styled on a rustic wooden table with subtle props like cutlery and a linen napkin in the background, 45-degree dining angle, full frame composition filling the entire image with no empty white space, editorial food magazine quality --ar 1:1

steps: Whisk eggs, milk, vanilla, and cinnamon in a shallow dish
Dip each bread slice in the egg mixture, coating both sides
Melt butter in a frying pan over medium heat
Cook bread for 2-3 minutes on each side until golden brown
recipe.proTip: Use slightly stale bread for best results as it soaks up the egg mixture better

slides.image_prompt: Professional food photography, Egg in a Basket made with 2 large eggs, 2 slices of bread, 1 tbsp butter and Salt and pepper to taste, beautifully plated, on a ceramic plate, natural soft window lighting with warm tones, slight depth of field, appetising textures and high detail, styled on a rustic wooden table with subtle props like cutlery and a linen napkin in the background, 45-degree dining angle, full frame composition filling the entire image with no empty white space, editorial food magazine quality --ar 1:1

steps: Cut a 3-inch circle from the center of each bread slice
Melt butter in a frying pan over medium heat
Place bread slices in the pan and crack an egg into each hole
Cook for 2-3 minutes, then flip and cook until egg reaches desired doneness
recipe.proTip: Fry the bread circles in butter alongside for tasty dipping 'soldiers'

slides.image_prompt: Professional food photography, Savory Bread Pudding made with 4 large eggs, 4 cups bread cubes, 2 cups milk, 1/2 cup grated cheese, 1/2 tsp salt, 1/4 tsp black pepper and 1/4 tsp garlic powder, beautifully plated, on a ceramic plate, natural soft window lighting with warm tones, slight depth of field, appetising textures and high detail, styled on a rustic wooden table with subtle props like cutlery and a linen napkin in the background, 45-degree dining angle, full frame composition filling the entire image with no empty white space, editorial food magazine quality --ar 1:1

steps: Preheat oven to 180°C (350°F)
Beat eggs, milk, salt, pepper, and garlic powder in a bowl
Place bread cubes in a baking dish, pour egg mixture over, and sprinkle with cheese
Bake for 35-40 minutes until golden and set
recipe.proTip: Let it rest for 10 minutes after baking for easier slicing

slides.image_prompt: Professional food photography, Bread and Egg Strata made with 6 large eggs, 6 slices of bread, 1 cup milk, 1/2 cup chopped ham or bacon, 1/2 cup grated cheese, 1/4 tsp salt and 1/4 tsp black pepper, beautifully plated, on a ceramic plate, natural soft window lighting with warm tones, slight depth of field, appetising textures and high detail, styled on a rustic wooden table with subtle props like cutlery and a linen napkin in the background, 45-degree dining angle, full frame composition filling the entire image with no empty white space, editorial food magazine quality --ar 1:1

steps: Grease a baking dish and layer with bread cubes
Sprinkle with ham or bacon and half the cheese
Whisk eggs, milk, salt, and pepper, then pour over bread
Top with remaining cheese and bake at 180°C for 40-45 minutes until set
recipe.proTip: Prepare the night before and refrigerate for extra flavor and easy morning breakfast

slides.image_prompt: Professional food photography, Bread Frittata made with 4 large eggs, 2 slices of bread, 1/4 cup milk, 1/2 cup grated cheese, 1/4 cup chopped onion, 1/4 cup diced bell pepper, 1 tbsp olive oil and Salt and pepper to taste, beautifully plated, on a ceramic plate, natural soft window lighting with warm tones, slight depth of field, appetising textures and high detail, styled on a rustic wooden table with subtle props like cutlery and a linen napkin in the background, 45-degree dining angle, full frame composition filling the entire image with no empty white space, editorial food magazine quality --ar 1:1

steps: Preheat oven to 200°C (400°F)
Sauté onion and bell pepper in olive oil until soft
Beat eggs with milk, salt, and pepper, then stir in bread cubes and cheese
Combine with vegetables in an oven-safe pan and bake for 15-18 minutes until set
recipe.proTip: Let it cool for 5 minutes before slicing to help it hold its shape
